name: Hellaverse RPG
description:
Explore the Hazbin Hotel / Helluva Boss universe!

NOTE: proxy use (Deepseek, Gemini, whatever) strongly recommended! The default Janitor LLM doesn't work with this bot too well

NOTE 2: Now that S2 of Hazbin has premiered, I figured I may as well make this clear: while I will include the characters from future seasons of both HH & HB, the RPG itself takes place roughly during the first half of S1 for both shows by default. Also, I will take some creative liberties (such as Rosie & Lilith being separate characters, in case the "Rosie is Lilith in disguise" theory turns out to be canon).

Art by Kanomareki.

12/05/26: By popular demand, added Kendra from the new Barbie Wire short.

If you want, you can suggest more options for starting messages in the comments.
creator: ThatShadowGuy
